question_text: Which of the following devices converts energy with the highest efficiency?

options.label: A
options.text: A traditional incandescent light bulb (about 5% efficient)

options.label: C
options.text: A fossil fuel power station (about 35% efficient)

explanation: Electric motors convert electrical energy to kinetic (movement) energy very efficiently, at around 85%. This is much higher than incandescent bulbs which waste most energy as heat, power stations which lose heat, and kettles which lose heat through the surrounding air.
